name: The Imamura Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: The Imamura Securities Co., Ltd. provides investment and financial services in Japan. The company trades in securities and market derivatives, and gold bullion; and operates a brokerage agency for securities trading. It also underwrites securities; provides private placement of securities; and sells insurance products, as well as is involved in the financial instruments and other commodity futures trading businesses. The company was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Kanazawa, Japan.
